title.en: Ye Tian immediately turned into a void kun.

content.en:
Ye Tian himself has a talent for disguise, and he also has some treasures that can change his aura and assist in disguise.

It can be said that once disguised, unless it is a familiar person, even a galaxy-level or galaxy-level powerhouse may not be able to gain insight into Ye Tian's identity, unless it is a powerhouse with a talent of insight.

But that Xukun obviously didn't have a talent like insight, and it was not easy to see through Ye Tian.

In addition, Ye Tian also has a god-level space talent and an information sharing talent, and the creatures with god-level space talent may not be only Xukun, but if you add the information sharing talent, it is estimated that there is really only a Xukun category.

Therefore, Ye Tian showed these two talents, and Xu Kun naturally thought that Ye Tian was the same kind in his heart, and would not doubt Ye Tian's identity.

"Disguise!"

Ye Tian immediately turned into a void kun.

When he used his copying talent to copy to Xukun, he had already seen Xukun's appearance clearly, although he would not disguise his mistakes.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian turned into a void.

Then, Ye Tian activated the talent of information sharing and contacted the Xukun.

"I'm here!"

Ye Tian sent this message, and the one who was Xukun quickly received it, and immediately used his information sharing talent to send a message.

"You use your information-sharing talent to send me a location! I'll play with you!"

The one replied.

Ye Tiandang immediately sent a location to his location.

After a while, a void appeared.

"Hey, it turned out to be a little Xukun, did your parents bring you in?"

Xukun asked.

"I don't know, I came here by accident and found that I couldn't get out!" Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"Can't get out?" Xu Kun stared at Ye Tian and said, "That's right, your cultivation is too weak, if you come in accidentally, you really can't get out." Do you want me to take you out? However, I don't want to leave for the time being, and if I do, it will be more troublesome to get in. "

"Then I won't go out yet, let's play here, can you take me here to play?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!"

Xukun agreed.

Next, during the exchange with Xukun, Ye Tian knew some basic information.

For example, in the mouth of Xukun, it is not called the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, but the Void Realm!

The Void Realm is very large, and according to this Void Kun, the Void Realm is divided into multiple regions, but there are still connections between each area, but the connection points are not easy to find in ordinary Void Kun.

In addition, there are a lot of Void Kun in the Void Realm, and Void Kun is considered to be the overlord-level force in the Void Realm, but the number of Void Kun is originally small, and there are too many areas in the Void Realm, resulting in it is difficult to encounter the same kind of Void Kun in the same Void Realm region.

The purpose of Xukun entering the Void Realm is very simple, that is, to improve his strength.

In addition to the Heavenly Dao scripts in the Void Realm, some special treasures will also be born, and Void Kun can devour these treasures to improve his strength.

"Here, here you go!"

Xu Kun suddenly gave Ye Tian a leaf.

The leaves are dark black throughout, but faintly glowing with gold.

"This is the Heavenly Dao Leaf, which can counteract the void pressure of the Void Realm, otherwise you won't be able to stay in the Void Realm for too long. If you want to go out, block the power of the Heavenly Dao Leaf, and the Void will automatically exclude you. This is also a way to leave the Void, but you will need to wait until the day when the Void automatically rejects you. According to my experience, we Void Kun can stay in the Void Realm for about three years. "

Xu Kun explained to Ye Tian.

"Three years!" Ye Tian was slightly surprised, this was much longer than a year for the human race.

But when you think of the special nature of Xukun, it is easy to understand.

Immediately, Ye Tian put away the Heavenly Dao Leaf, put it on his body, and sandwiched the Heavenly Dao Leaf with flesh and blood.

In this way, he can stay in the Void for a long time.

This head is called Yama Three, because there is also a Yama One and a Yama Two on it.

Regarding the way Xu Kun was named, Ye Tian was speechless.

And Ye Tian also gave himself a name for Xukun, that is, it was called Ye Yi, this name was very in line with the characteristics of Xukun, Yamasan didn't doubt it at all, and even said that Ye Tian's name was very good.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian asked: "Yama San, I saw an area before, there was something in it, I wanted to go in, a figure came out to beat me, I left immediately, what is that?"

"That's the Heavenly Dao Text!"

Yamasan hurriedly said.

Yamasan seemed to be very bored, and before Ye Tian could continue to ask, he began to tell about the situation about the Heavenly Dao text, which was roughly the same as Ye Tian's understanding.

However, Yama-san mentions one more important piece of information.

"Ye Yi, the general Heavenly Dao text is of little use to our Void Kun, only the Void Heavenly Dao Text can improve our Void Kun's strength, but the Void Heavenly Dao text is relatively rare. Yamasan said.

"Yama San, do you know where there is the Heavenly Dao text of the Void?"

Ye Tian asked with some expectation.

"I know that there is an empty Heavenly Dao text in a place, but the empty Heavenly Dao text is also good for me, so why should I give it to you?" asked Yamasan.

Although Yama San is simple and not as scheming as many people, it does not mean that he is stupid.

The Void Heavenly Dao Text is such a precious treasure, and Void Kun is almost a space creature, and the desire for the Void Heavenly Dao Text is very great, so he will not easily give the Empty Heavenly Dao Text to others.

"I once entered a place and got a spatial inheritance, and I will exchange the spatial inheritance for you!"

Ye Tian took out his chips and said.

"Spatial inheritance, could it be the spatial inheritance of those races in the universe?" Yamasan showed interest.

Immediately, he asked in surprise, "Didn't you enter the main space of the universe?"

"Well, I've entered it once!" Ye Tian nodded, he guessed that the main space of the universe that Yama San was talking about was the countless star fields where all races in the universe now live.

"You are so bold, and you are not afraid of being captured by those strong people in the main space of the universe, I heard those elders of the clan say that the value of our Xukun is very high, and once the strong people of those great universe clans see us, they will definitely capture us for study. Yamasan said.

Ye Tian nodded again and again, agreeing with Yamasan's words, in short, he did not refute it.

Immediately, Ye Tian took out a part of the inheritance: "This is a part of the inheritance, can you see if it will be useful to you?"

The inheritances he took out were all the secret art inheritances on space obtained from the Crystal Spirit Clan, and he didn't know if it would be useful to Xukun.

After all, he didn't know much about the Void Kun clan at all.

Who knows, Yamasan browsed the spatial inheritance, and immediately said excitedly: "Okay, this inheritance, I want it! I am willing to trade with you!"

Obviously, this inheritance has helped Yama-san a lot.

"It seems that although the Void Kun Clan has a very high level in terms of spatial talent, in fact, their research on spatial talent is far inferior to that of the Purple Crystal Spirit Clan. It seems that the comprehension of the Xukun clan is not very good, no wonder the potential of this Xukun in other aspects is very average. Ye Tian thought to himself.

Then, this Void Kun took Ye Tian to the depths of the Void Realm.

Ye Tian's speed was very slow, but the speed of this head was very fast.

This Void Kun's cultivation is at the level of the galaxy, coupled with the fact that he has a god-level spatial talent, he seems to have mastered a kind of spatial secret technique, and he can walk in the void realm with the power of space, and the speed is far beyond Ye Tian's imagination.

At the beginning, Ye Tian saw the fleeting figure of Xukun, it was not its real speed, its real speed made Ye Tian unable to even perceive a shadow.

Time passed little by little, and in the blink of an eye, ten days passed.

this day.

Ye Tian came to a ruin under the guidance of Xukun Yamasan.

That's right, ruins!

It's like a continent, but all the buildings on it are shattered.

The buildings here are all large, but the style is rather weird.

"This used to be the location of a Void tribe, they should have moved into the Void and lived here, but they encountered a disaster, maybe they fled, maybe they fell into the Void Realm. In one of the fortresses, there was an Empty Heavenly Dao text inside. But this Void Heavenly Dao Script has already given birth to a Heavenly Dao Guardian. If you want to enter the fortress, you must face the guardians of the Heavenly Dao. If it were in the outside world, my strength would definitely easily kill this Heavenly Dao Guardian. But it's a pity that when I entered the realm, my virtual power was completely suppressed, and my strength couldn't be exerted at all, so I couldn't beat you, the guardian of the Heavenly Dao. "

Yamasan said, pointing to a fortress in the center.

"You can't beat it, how can I beat it?" Ye Tian asked.

"When I enter the realm, my cultivation will be suppressed, but your cultivation is low, and the degree of suppression is slightly smaller. As long as it depends on how well you attained in space, you have obtained this inheritance, and you should have a high attainment in the laws of space, and you may be able to break through. I brought you here where the text of the Sky Heavenly Dao is located, and you won't regret it, will you?"

"I won't regret it, I'll give it to you!"

Ye Tian passed on the remaining space to Yamasan.

This inheritance is of little value to him, and if he gives it, he will give it.

Yama San was thrilled to have received all of his inheritance.

And Ye Tian flew into the fortress and quickly entered the fortress.

"Which tribe's little guy is so easy to deceive, isn't it? I used a piece of information that he couldn't get to get to get such a precious inheritance. I guess I don't know much about the preciousness of this inheritance!" Yamasan laughed happily thinking that he had taken advantage of himself.

It did not leave, but waited here.

When Ye Tian came out after he failed, he took Ye Tian to play to make up for Ye Tian's loss.

In the fortress.

As soon as Ye Tian entered, he stepped into the realm of the Void Heaven Dao Text and saw the Void Heaven Dao Text.

"If it's really the Empty Heavenly Dao text, Yamasan didn't lie to me!"

Ye Tian said in surprise.
